channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Another rubbish issue, 21st April
item.description:
4 bags of rubbish left, which is a common problem. Please find a solution as it is attracting vermin, unhygienic and an eyesore.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on corner, 21st April
item.description:
Sofa fly tipped at corner of Spurstowe Road/Marcon place. Laura’s idea Ltd business also dumped food boxes there again.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marcon Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpark outside Snap Fitness Belvedere, 21st April
item.description:
This car has been left in one of our spaces for over two months and although has received ticket there has been no movement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Brights Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed brown bin, 21st April
item.description:
MISSED BROWN BIN PAYING FOR (TWO) ONLY one collected please empty ASAP urgent request 94 tyrrell ave
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tyrrell Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to Nike nest top of Carlisle Rd, 21st April
item.description:
Household waste some bagged. There was opposition to the bike nest due to their potential to attract fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chevening Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Overgrown bushes in between gardens, 21st April
item.description:
There are overgrown bushes in between gardens, no clear view or access to the pathway if needed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Caletock Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning request and flytipping in bridge road, 21st April
item.description:
Res has called to state that bridge road has not been cleaned or swept in a very long time, its full of litter and leaves. There is also a suitcase, wood and a metal poll outside number 80 bridge road by there front wall on the pavement and this is a very busy street with schools. Can this please be looked into asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bridge Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 21st April
item.description:
This vehicle has been here for several months. Renault Clio Silver Reg GK68 PCV Parked on highway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Colney Hatch Lane, Colney Hatch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 21st April
item.description:
Outside 284 Bating Road Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Baring Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly tipping on Avignon Road SE4 2JS, 21st April
item.description:
Sofa has been dumped. It is on a raised area in between 39 Avignon Road (SE4 2JS) and Monmouth House on Avignon Road. The area is prone to people fly tipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avignon Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st April
item.description:
Fly tip from the alleyway had now moved to the rear of the property into the bushes in the park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holmsdale Grove, North End, Greater London
